name: kimi-copilot-provider
description: Use Kimi K3 and K2.x models in GitHub Copilot Chat — Thinking/reasoning display, vision, tool calling, zero config. 🎁 New to Kimi? Subscribe via referral and we both get up to 1-Year Membership Credits: https://kimi-bot.com/activities/viral-referral/share?scenario=subscribe&from=share_poster&invitation_code=ZKH245

kimiCopilot.apiKey.description: DEPRECATED: API key is now stored securely via the 'Kimi Copilot: Set API Key' command.

kimiCopilot.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the Kimi API. Change for self-hosted or proxied deployments.

kimiCopilot.endpoint.description: Full Kimi API endpoint URL. Overrides baseUrl when set to a non-default value.

kimiCopilot.modelIdOverrides.description: Override API model IDs sent for each picker model. Example: { "kimi-for-coding": "your-custom-model-id" }

kimiCopilot.model.description: Default Kimi model ID used in chat. Use 'kimi-k3', 'kimi-k2.7-code', 'kimi-k2.7-code-highspeed', 'kimi-k2.6', or 'kimi-k2.5'.

kimiCopilot.modelConfigs.description: Per-model overrides. Key is the picker model ID. Example: { "kimi-k2.7-code": { maxInputTokens: 256000, maxOutputTokens: 32768, temperature: 1.0, topP: 0.95, thinking: { type: "enabled" }, systemPrompt: "..." } }.

overrideModelId.description: Override API model ID sent for this picker model.

maxInputTokens.description: Max input tokens reported to Copilot Chat for this model.

maxOutputTokens.description: Max output tokens for this model.

type.description: Thinking mode for K2.x models. K3 uses reasoningEffort instead.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for K3. K3 currently supports max on the Platform API.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt used for this model.

toolCalling.description: Enable tool calling for this model.

kimiCopilot.temperature.description: Sampling temperature for generation (0–2). Per-model value in modelConfigs takes precedence.

kimiCopilot.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per response. K3 uses max_completion_tokens. Typical agent maximum is 32768; set to 0 for model default.

kimiCopilot.topP.description: Top-p (nucleus) sampling. Kimi K2.7 Code API only supports 0.95; this value is always used.

kimiCopilot.presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty for new tokens. Kimi K2.7 Code requires 0.0.

kimiCopilot.frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty for repeated tokens. Kimi K2.7 Code requires 0.0.

kimiCopilot.systemPrompt.default: You are Kimi, an AI assistant provided by Moonshot AI. You are proficient in Chinese and English conversations. You provide users with safe, helpful, and accurate answers. You will reject any questions involving terrorism, racism, or explicit content. Moonshot AI is a proper noun and should not be translated.
kimiCopilot.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent with every request. Can be overridden per model in modelConfigs.

kimiCopilot.contextWarningThreshold.description: Ratio of context window usage at which to warn that the session is getting full.

kimiCopilot.contextErrorThreshold.description: Ratio of context window usage at which to refuse the request and suggest starting a new session.

kimiCopilot.autoCompactOnLimit.description: When a request exceeds the token limit, automatically trigger Copilot Chat compaction (/compact) and show a warning. The user is notified only once per session.

kimiCopilot.plan.description: Your Kimi plan. Used to pick the correct context limit for multi-tier models like K3.

scripts.test:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.vscode-test';if(fs.existsSync(p)){fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Cleared '+p)}" && npm run compile && npm run test
